name: WebhookIngestionHandler

neutralConcepts: CF-211: HMAC verification MUST use crypto.timingSafeEqual() — NEVER string ===
Invalid HMAC: return { received: true, ingested: false } — always HTTP 200
IR-3/DNA-7: idempotency check BEFORE raw store
IR-4/CF-192: raw zone append-only — storeDocument only, no updateDocument
WebhookEventIngested payload MUST NOT include hmacSecret, credential, apiKey
Vault error → fail-closed: treat as invalid HMAC

ironRules.rule: CF-211: crypto.timingSafeEqual() MUST be used for HMAC comparison — NEVER string ===.
Invalid HMAC returns { received: true, ingested: false } — never expose HMAC mismatch in response.
Idempotency check BEFORE raw store — DNA-7.
CF-192: raw zone append-only — no updateDocument.
WebhookEventIngested MUST NOT include credential fields (hmacSecret, apiKey). — F427.
Vault error → fail-closed: treat as HMAC invalid.

keywords: webhook ingestion handler HMAC timing safe equal CF-211 vault fail-closed idempotency raw zone append-only WebhookEventIngested DuplicateIngestionDetected RecordQuarantined
